title: Spicy Juicy Slovakian Eggs Omelette
description: A vibrant, low‑calorie brunch omelette packed with free‑range eggs, fiery paprika, and fresh Slovakian vegetables, finished crisp in an air‑fryer for quick, clean cooking.
instructions: 1. In a bowl, whisk the eggs until lightly frothy.
2. Stir in the diced tomatoes, red onion, basil, smoked paprika, red pepper flakes, and pinches of sea salt.
3. Heat the air‑fryer basket at 180 °C (356 °F) with a light spray of olive oil for 2 minutes.
4. Pour the egg mixture into the preheated basket and spread evenly.
5. Cook in the air‑fryer for 5 minutes, then gently tilt the basket to allow any uncooked edges to flow to the center.
6. Continue cooking for an additional 2–3 minutes, or until the omelette is set and lightly browned.
7. Carefully remove the basket and transfer the omelette to a plate.
8. Slice diagonally and serve immediately, optionally garnishing with extra basil or a drizzle of hot sauce.
9. Pair with a side of low‑calorie fruit or a green salad for a complete brunch.
10. Enjoy while hot for the best flavor and texture.
